<?php declare(strict_types=1); namespace Pest\Exceptions; use InvalidArgumentException; use NunoMaduro\Collision\Contracts\RenderlessEditor; use NunoMaduro\Collision\Contracts\RenderlessTrace; use Symfony\Component\Console\Exception\ExceptionInterface; /** * @internal */ final class TestAlreadyExist extends InvalidArgumentException implements ExceptionInterface, RenderlessEditor, RenderlessTrace { /** * Creates a new Exception instance. */ public function __construct(string $fileName, string $description) { parent::__construct(sprintf('A test with the description `%s` already exists in the filename `%s`.', $description, $fileName)); } }
